devbar.1.9.2: Demo button + HiFi screenshot (Alt+Click) in toolbar, recording auto-opens viewer, demo document state fields
devbar.1.9.1: Bump sweetlink dependency to v1.14.0 (persistent daemon, ref system, ring buffers, session recording)
devbar.1.9.0: Official plugins (git-branch, app-version), server info on state (gitBranch, appName), PALETTE.white, root tsconfig with project references, 232 new tests
devbar.1.8.4: Fix custom controls not showing: store controls on window to survive bundler module duplication, render controls in compact mode
devbar.1.8.0: Shadow theme tokens, CSS_COLORS theming fixes, function extraction, noUncheckedIndexedAccess
devbar.1.7.5: Correct ruler icon SVG, PALETTE color system centralization
devbar.1.7.1: Ruler tool for measuring element dimensions on-page
devbar.1.6.4: Console log sync, CLI shutdown coordination
devbar.1.6.0: Inline DepartureMono font, capture browser-level errors
devbar.1.5.3: CSP bypass via Playwright fallback for exec/click/query
devbar.1.5.0: Control groups, info variant, and non-interactive badges
devbar.1.4.0: DRY modal copy/download, pre-release audit, expanded tests
devbar.1.3.0: Accessibility audit, document outline, schema extraction
devbar.1.2.0: Screenshot quality slider, settings crash fix
devbar.1.0.0: Initial release — breakpoints, vitals, console, screenshots

sweetlink.1.16.0: Bundle Claude Code skills (screenshot, console-check, responsive-screenshots, resize-for-claude), agent (sweetlink-visual-iterative), and context files (architecture, CDP guide, UI verification mandate) — shipped with npm package for automatic discovery
sweetlink.1.15.0: Demo document builder (Showboat-inspired), universal sharing (report --clipboard/--serve/--webhook), viewer share buttons (Copy Report, Download), multi-language server error detection, SUMMARY.md auto-generation, git metadata in recordings, overlay toggle, responsive viewer, HiFi screenshots from devbar (Alt+Click), comparison tables in docs
sweetlink.1.14.0: Sweetlink v2: persistent Playwright daemon (--hifi, --responsive), @ref system from accessibility tree (snapshot -i, click @e3, fill @e4), snapshot diffing (-D) and annotated screenshots (-a), always-on console/network ring buffers, session recording with interactive viewer, cursor highlights, visual diff, device emulation, PR evidence upload
sweetlink.1.13.0: Next.js plugin: withSweetlink() config wrapper for zero-config dev server integration, auto-detects port from --port argv
sweetlink.1.12.1: Fix navigateBrowser URL verification: poll until actual URL matches target to prevent premature capture on SPAs
sweetlink.1.12.0: App identity: server detects git branch/app name, CLI --app flag targets specific instance for parallel worktree dev
sweetlink.1.11.1: Biome formatting and lint, README updates
sweetlink.1.11.0: --url browser navigation, optional peerDeps for puppeteer-core/html2canvas-pro, docs overhaul
sweetlink.1.10.0: --json and --output-schema flags for structured CLI output
sweetlink.1.9.0: Wait-for selector, async exec, return statement auto-wrap
sweetlink.1.8.1: Console log buffer sync, 209 new tests
sweetlink.1.8.0: CLI shutdown synchronization with dev server lifecycle
sweetlink.1.6.0: Console log eviction sync, browser error capture
sweetlink.1.4.0: Dead code removal, deduplicated constants, 85 new tests
sweetlink.1.3.0: CDP and ruler test suites, ruler/playwright sub-exports
sweetlink.1.2.0: Outline and schema tools moved from devbar, modal UX
sweetlink.1.1.0: Auto-detect save location, browser download mode
sweetlink.1.0.0: Initial release — screenshots, logs, HMR capture, CLI
